visual_dna.world: archival footage aesthetic — scan lines, gate weave, colour fade, timestamp burns — the look of historical truth
visual_dna.camera_system: Super 8 or 16mm emulation, Bolex Rex-5 look, optical sound artifacts present in frame
visual_dna.film: Kodachrome 40 expired — heavy magenta shift, dense grain, dust and scratch overlay, faded highlights, vignette
visual_dna.lighting_primary: available light, over-exposed highlights, colour shift to cyan-orange crossprocess
visual_dna.lighting_secondary: flicker from aging lamp — unstable light source as period detail
visual_dna.motion_character: gate weave 2-pixel random drift per frame, speed fluctuation ±5%, jump cuts between observations
visual_dna.anchor_text: grain density + colour grading + vignette + scan line texture consistency
visual_dna.full_anchor: [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] grain density + colour grading + vignette + scan line texture consistency. Kodachrome 40 expired — heavy magenta shift, dense grain, dust and scratch overlay, faded highlights, vignette. Temporal consistency across all clips.

shot_list.intent: Stop the scroll. Establish tension before explanation.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 1 (0–5s): Aesthetic: Archive Documentary. archival footage aesthetic — scan lines, gate weave, colour fade, timestamp burns — the look of historical truth. Empty office desk. Untouched ISA paperwork sits under a paperweight. A phone screen lights up — notification unseen. Camera: Super 8 or 16mm emulation, Bolex Rex-5 look, optical sound artifacts present in frame. Motion: gate weave 2-pixel random drift per frame, speed fluctuation ±5%, jump cuts between observations. Lighting: available light, over-exposed highlights, colour shift to cyan-orange crossprocess. flicker from aging lamp — unstable light source as period detail. Film stock: Kodachrome 40 expired — heavy magenta shift, dense grain, dust and scratch overlay, faded highlights, vignette. Atmosphere: warm practical light flickers once at 2 seconds — power-grid suggestion — then stabilises. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] grain density + colour grading + vignette + scan line texture consistency. Kodachrome 40 expired — heavy magenta shift, dense grain, dust and scratch overlay, faded highlights, vignette. Temporal consistency across all clips. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: modern crisp digital video, clean aesthetic, contemporary equipment, smooth motion, current technology.
shot_list.negative_prompt: blur, distortion, watermark, text overlay, low quality, compression artifacts, flickering, inconsistent lighting, morphing faces, morphing textures, oversaturation, plastic skin, smooth waxy texture, artificial bokeh halos, readable account numbers, readable financial data, screen moiré, modern crisp digital video, clean aesthetic, contemporary equipment, smooth motion, current technology

shot_list.intent: Show how it works. Documentary observation, information discovered.
shot_list.prompt: Shot 2: Aesthetic: Archive Documentary. archival footage aesthetic — scan lines, gate weave, colour fade, timestamp burns — the look of historical truth. ISA wrapper mechanism shown through simple visual metaphor — money inside protected versus money outside taxed. Camera: Super 8 or 16mm emulation, Bolex Rex-5 look, optical sound artifacts present in frame. Motion: gate weave 2-pixel random drift per frame, speed fluctuation ±5%, jump cuts between observations. Lighting: available light, over-exposed highlights, colour shift to cyan-orange crossprocess. flicker from aging lamp — unstable light source as period detail. Film stock: Kodachrome 40 expired — heavy magenta shift, dense grain, dust and scratch overlay, faded highlights, vignette. Atmosphere: steam or breath barely visible in cold air, secondary motion from ventilation barely stirs any fabric. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] grain density + colour grading + vignette + scan line texture consistency. Kodachrome 40 expired — heavy magenta shift, dense grain, dust and scratch overlay, faded highlights, vignette. Temporal consistency across all clips. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: modern crisp digital video, clean aesthetic, contemporary equipment, smooth motion, current technology.

ISA application page open. Cursor moves. The action is being taken. Camera moves with the resolution. Camera: Super 8 or 16mm emulation, Bolex Rex-5 look, optical sound artifacts present in frame. [Visual DNA — embed unchanged in every clip] grain density + colour grading + vignette + scan line texture consistency. Kodachrome 40 expired — heavy magenta shift, dense grain, dust and scratch overlay, faded highlights, vignette. Temporal consistency across all clips. Avoid: watermarks, text overlays, subtitle artifacts, camera jitter, morphing surfaces, flickering light, inconsistent shadows. Also avoid: modern crisp digital video, clean aesthetic, contemporary equipment, smooth motion, current technology.
